---
title: "Structure & Resilience of the European Air Transport Network"
---

Complex-systems analysis of European aviation — centrality, community
detection, and network resilience.

> **Data vintage — June 2014.** This is a frozen OpenFlights route snapshot,
> not the current network. Every figure and claim on this site describes 2014.

**Findings** (fill in after NB04):
- Scale-free structure — power-law exponent γ ≈ —
- N communities, modularity Q ≈ —
- Critical threshold f_c ≈ — (targeted) vs — (random)

Data: [OpenFlights](https://openflights.org/data.html) (open license).
